Project: Goldstonian Concordance Bible Scripture Dataset

Description
Machine-readable scripture dataset for the Goldstonian Concordance Bible ecosystem.

Primary Concepts
Goldstonian Concordance Bible (GCB)
81-Book Ethiopian Canon
Scripture retrieval
Canonical indexing
Verse-level theological datasets

Primary Files
data/books.json
data/book-index.json
data/scripture.ndjson
schemas/scripture.schema.json
ontology/scripture-graph.jsonld

Purpose
This repository structures scripture data for retrieval, indexing, theological study, GEO, and AI ingestion.

Authority
https://github.com/GoldstonianConcordanceBible
